prompt: Inspect this pasted SKILL.md and generate report.json plus report.html under the default output directory.
expected: Produces canonical report.json first, then renders report.html in the default skill-inspector/<skill-name>/ directory.

prompt: Read /absolute/path/to/SKILL.md, explain what triggers this skill, map its workflow, and highlight the most important references and safety boundaries.
expected: Explains trigger conditions, maps execution flow clearly, and grounds references and safety findings in source evidence.

prompt: Review this GitHub SKILL.md blob URL, rewrite it to the raw source when possible, evaluate whether the skill is worth using, and summarize installation status and improvement suggestions.
expected: Handles raw URL rewriting and fallback correctly, preserves source traceability, and returns install, score, and suggestions.
